text.title: Portfolio Evm Rollup Method — Decision Tree

decision-tree.root-question: Does the portfolio have ≥3 projects, all running individual EVM, with a named portfolio owner and a scheduled exec review?

branch.when: project_count >= 3 AND all_projects_evm == true AND owner_named == true AND exec_review_scheduled == true
branch.conclusion: Run the rollup: per-project metrics + weighted portfolio aggregate + variance narrative + outcome review.
Block. Establish per-project EVM first; rollup has nothing to aggregate.
Skip. Single-project EVM is enough; aggregate is noise.
